description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a broad, low-pitched hip roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light color with a stone or concrete base, and the house sits on a neatly manicured green lawn. There is a prominent wooden deck or porch area with steps leading up to the main entrance, partially enclosed by a wooden railing. Large windows line one side of the house, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure features a combination of open and covered spaces, with the roof extending to shelter the porch and entryway. The property is bordered by a short fence on one side, adding to its suburban character.
description: A single-story house with a wide hip roof, light walls, stone base, and a wooden porch, set on a green lawn with large windows and a partial fence.
description_view_0: The rear or side view shows the broad hip roof, stone base, and a partially enclosed wooden porch with steps.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the large windows and the extended roof, with the stone base and lawn clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals a more solid wall with fewer windows and a sheltered entryway under the roof.
description_view_3: The front view features the main wooden porch, steps, large windows, and a short fence section, emphasizing the entry area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on one side
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wooden porch with steps, partial railing, and a covered overhang integrated into the roof.
